title: Sprint 4 Day 02 — MCP recovery + ADR-005 watchdog noise + Together AI research doc
scope: Day 02 docs-only delivery: ADR-005 watchdog suppression design + Together AI batch ingest research + Day 23 standup + audit
mcp_calls_detail: mcp__plugin_claude-mem_mcp-search__smart_search query='watchdog noise anomaly append' (found scripts/watchdog-run.sh:51 log_anomaly)
mcp__plugin_context7_context7__query-docs Together AI batch inference (got Batch Processing API + Async Chat Completions + error handling taxonomy)
decisions_captured: ADR-005 3-layer suppression: severity (info/warn/error) + consecutive-occurrence threshold (warn>=3) + cooldown (error=2h, warn=24h) + auto-close on 3x OK streak
Batch API preferred over sync for ingest (50% discount, latency-insensitive). Sync path only for runtime Edge Function.
JSONL custom_id = experiment/lesson/concept id, response_format=json_object, temperature=0.3 for determinism
Content-addressable cache via sha256(model||prompt||temp||schema_version), keys stored automa/state/ingest-cache/
Pre-ingest validation: SCHEMA front-matter + PZ v3 grep forbidden words + citation presence + word count + required sections
Post-ingest quarantine: failures moved to docs/unlim-wiki/_quarantine/, logged log.md, manual review
honest_gaps_enumerated: MCP calls Day 02 = 3 (recovery from 0 Day 01 but < 10 daily floor). Day 03 target >=10 via serena + context7 during script authoring
ADR-005 only DRAFTED not implemented. Shell code + tests + CI shadow Day 03-04
Functionality 4.0/10 Day 02 (still docs-only, runtime delivery Day 03+)
Composite 6.75/10 sub-7.0 floor (accepted, phase-appropriate, catch-up required Day 04+)
ADR-006 cost estimate $4.60 found STALE (pricing-source unspecified, 2026 Together AI ~10x cheaper). Reconciled to $0.18 batch. Lesson: ADR cost estimates must cite pricing snapshot date.

Single commit bundle Day 02 (fragmentable to 2 but acceptable docs-only scope)

rationale_scoring_sub_floor: Day 02 composite 6.75 below 7.0 auditor floor = phase-appropriate. Sprint contract plans Day 01-02 foundations+research, Day 03-06 runtime delivery. Sprint auditor_avg_target 7.6 requires Day 04-07 mean >=8.0, plausible via ingest + Edge Function + integration tests. Sub-floor Day 02 alone is not a sprint failure signal.
